2604.04614.title: A Clinical Point Cloud Paradigm for In-Hospital Mortality Prediction from Multi-Level Incomplete Multimodal EHRs
2604.04614.paper_summary: Deep learning-based modeling of multimodal Electronic Health Records (EHRs) has become an important approach for clinical diagnosis and risk prediction. However, due to diverse clinical workflows and privacy constraints, raw EHRs are inherently multi-level incomplete, including irregular sampling, missing modalities, and sparse labels. These issues cause temporal misalignment, modality imbalance, and limited supervision. Most existing multimodal methods assume relatively complete data, and even methods designed for incompleteness usually address only one or two of these issues in isolation. As a result, they often rely on rigid temporal/modal alignment or discard incomplete data, which may distort raw clinical semantics. To address this problem, we propose HealthPoint (HP), a unified clinical point cloud paradigm for multi-level incomplete EHRs. HP represents heterogeneous clinical events as points in a continuous 4D space defined by content, time, modality, and case. To model interactions between arbitrary point pairs, we introduce a Low-Rank Relational Attention mechanism that efficiently captures high-order dependencies across these four dimensions. We further develop a hierarchical interaction and sampling strategy to balance fine-grained modeling and computational efficiency. Built on this framework, HP enables flexible event-level interaction and fine-grained self-supervision, supporting robust modality recovery and effective use of unlabeled data. Experiments on large-scale EHR datasets for risk prediction show that HP consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance and strong robustness under varying degrees of incompleteness.
2604.04614.paper_summary_zh: 基於深度學習的多模態電子健康紀錄（EHRs）建模已成為臨床診斷和風險預測的重要方法。<lb/>然而，由於多樣的臨床工作流程和隱私限制，原始EHR本質上是多層次不完整的，包括不規則取樣、缺失模態和稀疏標籤。<lb/>這些問題導致時間錯位、模態不平衡和有限的監督。<lb/>大多數現有的多模態方法假設數據相對完整，即使是針對不完整性設計的方法通常僅獨立解決其中一到兩個問題。<lb/>因此，它們往往依賴於僵化的時間/模態對齊或丟棄不完整數據，這可能會扭曲原始臨床語義。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了HealthPoint（HP），一種統一的多層次不完整EHR的臨床點雲範式。<lb/>HP將異質的臨床事件表示為在由內容、時間、模態和案例定義的連續4D空間中的點。<lb/>為了建模任意點對之間的相互作用，我們引入了一種低秩關係注意機制，能有效捕捉這四個維度之間的高階依賴性。<lb/>我們進一步開發了一種分層互動和取樣策略，以平衡細粒度建模和計算效率。<lb/>基於這一框架，HP實現了靈活的事件級互動和細粒度自我監督，支持穩健的模態恢復和有效利用未標記數據。<lb/>在大型EHR數據集上進行的風險預測實驗表明，HP在不同程度的不完整性下始終實現了最先進的性能和強大的穩健性。
2604.04614.author: Bohao Li et.al.
2604.04614.authors: Bohao Li, Tao Zou, Junchen Ye, Yan Gong, Bowen Du
